modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to add custom questions to Microsoft Bookings page.

full_description_text:  
So, I'm trying to set up my Microsoft Bookings page. I want to add some custom questions, but I can't. It says I don't have the rights to do it. Super frustrating!
short_description: Unable to add custom questions to Microsoft Bookings page.
description: So, I'm trying to set up my Microsoft Bookings page. I want to add some custom questions, but I can't. It says I don't have the rights to do it. Super frustrating!
